titleStmt.title: SII 10.310: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 310. (A.R. No. 138 of 1917.) ON A SLAB LYING IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF VĒNUGŌPĀLASVĀMI, POTTŪRU, GUNTUR TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT. Ś. 1168.

summary.p: Incomplete. The portion which describes the actual grant is missing. The portion available refers to what was probably a gift made to a Śiva temple by Parichchēda Bhīmarāja, Tammu Bhīmarāja, Dēvarāja and Gaṇapadēvarāja for the merit of their father Kōmmarāja and mother Sūraladēvi. Contains the usual Parichchēdi titles.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī svasti samadhigatapaṁca
mahāśabda mahāmaṁḍalēśva
ra vīramahēśvara kollipākapu
ravarādhīśvara durjjayakulakulā
calamrigēṁdra satyahariścaṁdra kri
ṣṇavēṇyānadīdakṣiṇa tīraṣaṭsa
hasramahīvallabha mallikāvalla
bha vīramukhadarppaṇa vibudhasaṁtarppaṇa
bhayalōbhadurlabha balameṟuvātasā
hasōttuṁgga raṇaraṁggabhairava cenupakā
mōda kubicikāmitra gaṁḍadhanaṁjaya
sahakārabāṁdhavu laina śrīmanmahā
maṁḍalēśvara pariccēda bhīmarājulū
taṁmubhīmarājulūnu dēvarājulūnu
gaṇapadēvarājulūnu tamataṁḍri svasti
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara pariccēda kō
mmarājulakūnu tallisūrala dēvikini
dharmmamu gānu . svasti śakavaruṣaṁbu
lu 1168 Agu nēṁṭi pavuṣya śuddha 5 gu .
nāṁḍu makarasaṁkrāṁttinimityamuna
svasti sakalasurāsuragaruḍa gaṁdharvvaki
nnara kiṁpuruṣōraga mauḷimakuṭaratnā
ruṇitapādapaṁkaja gaurīkucaku
nkumapaṁkāṁkita vakṣastala samasta
munīṁdrahridaya sarōvararājaha
ṁsāyamāna sanaka sanaṁdanādiyōgi
ṁdrasaṁstūyamāna sakalabhaktajanābhī
ṣṭaphalapradāyaka bhasmīkritakusuma
sāyaka paramamāhēśvarāhava
Note:—The impression of the inscription on the second face is missing.
Digital edition of SII 10.310 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
